log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Frost Giant attacks Vedalken — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 29 damage. Vedalken — Unarmored Caster HP: 38/67
Frost Giant attacks Vedalken — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Vedalken — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 7 vs DC 12]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Vedalken — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 3 ===

ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
